cases.prompt: what have we learned on this project?

assertions.text: Reads the project learnings store (learnings.jsonl under the project slug) and surfaces recent entries
Defaults to reviewing/showing recent learnings rather than mutating them

cases.prompt: didn't we already fix this same bug before? search the learnings

assertions.text: Searches past learnings (e.g. via gstack-learnings-search) for the matching prior pattern
Reports whether a matching prior learning exists instead of answering from scratch
Offers to prune stale learnings and export the remaining set
Confirms before destructively removing learnings (review/prune are distinct operations)
